title: Chamaenerion grandiflorum
intro: Chamaenerion grandiflorum, also known as gentian root or Qiang Huo, is a type of plant belonging to the Gentianaceae family, which is native to the mountainous regions of Asia and Europe. The root of this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory properties, which are said to help alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. The bioactive constituents of Chamaenerion grandiflorum include triterpene saponins, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are believed to contribute to its therapeutic effects. In traditional Chinese medicine, Qiang Huo is commonly processed into a crude herb or extracted into a decoction, and is often used in combination with other herbs to treat conditions such as bronchitis and rheumatism.
taxonomy: Chamaenerion grandiflorum is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Onagraceae. This family is commonly known as the evening primrose or willowherb family. Within the family Onagraceae, Chamaenerion grandiflorum is classified in the genus Chamaenerion. The genus Chamaenerion is further grouped into the tribe Onagreae. Chamaenerion grandiflorum is native to the Northern Hemisphere and is widely distributed in various parts of the world.
uses: Chamaenerion grandiflorum, also known as Great Willowherb, has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The plant contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been reported to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The roots and leaves of Chamaenerion grandiflorum are used to make infusions and teas, which are believed to help with detoxification and immune system support. However, further research is needed to confirm the effectiveness of these medicinal uses.

parts: Chamaenerion grandiflorum, also known as great willowherb or great fireweed, the medicinal parts of this plant have been used in traditional medicine.
